title: Savory Pistachio Dumplings
description: A Japanese-inspired dish featuring savory dumplings wrapped in a crunchy pistachio crust.

ingredients.name: Savory Filling
ingredients.notes: Chopped Chinese cabbage, 1/4 cup soy sauce, 2 cloves garlic, 1 tsp sesame oil

ingredients.name: Dumpling Filling
ingredients.notes: Chopped cabbage, 1/4 cup soy sauce, 2 cloves garlic

instructions: In a food processor, grind the pistachios into a fine crumb.
In a large mixing bowl, combine the savory filling ingredients and mix well.
Place a dumpling wrapper on a flat surface and place a tablespoon of the savory filling in the center.
Brush the edges of the wrapper with sesame oil.
Fold the wrapper into a triangle and press the edges together to seal the dumpling.
Repeat with the remaining wrappers and filling.
In a large skillet or wok, heat 2 tablespoons of sesame oil over medium-high heat.
When the oil is hot, add the dumplings and cook for 2-3 minutes on each side, until golden brown.
Serve the dumplings hot with a drizzle of soy sauce and garnish with sesame seeds.
